items.title: Base Endurance Run
items.description: Run 8 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Focus on maintaining a heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Warm up for 10 minutes, then perform 5x800m at 5:00 min/km pace with 3 minutes of recovery jog in between. Cool down for 10 minutes. Aim for a heart rate of 170-180 bpm during intervals.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Full-body strength workout focusing on core and leg strength. Include 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, lunges, and deadlifts. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a very easy pace of 7:30-8:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 130 bpm to aid recovery.
